_note: Standalone sauna example. 2400x2000mm sauna with single sauna_heater (400x400mm) at NW corner. Demonstrates the §703 3-zone split per verified file: sauna_zone_1 around heater + sauna_zone_2 sauna body + sauna_zone_3 above 1.5m. rcd_blanket with sauna_heater_excluded=true per §703.411.3.3. 2 existing fixtures both compliant.

anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Sauna heater extracted from architect Rev-B plan dated 2026-05-18; 400x400 floor-standing electric heater rated 6kW; sited at NW corner of sauna cabin per client schedule.
